page.name: FX Fade
page.pad1: var 'fxFadeHP' 1 ? repeat_start_instant 'fxFadeHP' ? blink 500ms & repeat_stop 'fxFadeHP' & effect_active 'Filter HP' off & set 'fxFadeHP' 0 : blink 500ms & effect_active 'Filter HP' off & set 'fxFadeHP' 0 : set 'fxFadeHP' 1 & set 'fxFadeStepsHP' 0 & effect_slider 'filter hp' 1 0 & effect_active 'filter hp' on & set 'beatMS' `get_bpm & param_1_x & param_multiply 60000` & param_multiply 0.25 &param_cast 'ms' & repeat_start_instant 'fxFadeHP' & effect_slider 'filter hp' 1 +0.03125 & cycle 'fxFadeStepsHP' 32 & var 'fxFadeStepsHP' 0 ? off & repeat_stop 'fxFadeHP'
page.pad8: padfx 'backspin' ? var 'fxFadeBS' 2 ? blink 500ms & padfx 'backspin' & play: off & padfx 'backspin' & play & set 'fxFadeBS' 0 : off & set 'fxFadeBS' 2 & padfx 'backspin' 0.5
page.pad4: padfx 'backspin' ? var 'fxFadeBS' 1 ? blink 500ms & padfx 'backspin' & play: off & padfx 'backspin' & play & set 'fxFadeBS' 0 : off & set 'fxFadeBS' 1 & padfx 'backspin' 0.3
page.pad3: padfx "loop out" ? blink 500ms & padfx 'loop out' : off & padfx 'loop out' 0.3 0.7 0.55 0.5 'Slip:on' 'Stop:on'
page.pad7: repeat_start 'fxFadeLoopChop' ? blink 500ms & repeat_stop 'fxFadeLoopChop' & loop_exit : off & set 'fxFadeLoopChopper' 0 & loop 8 & repeat_start 'fxFadeLoopChop' 44ms & loop 8 ? loop_position & param_bigger 90% ? set 'fxFadeLoopChopper' 1 : var 'fxFadeLoopChopper' 1 ? loop 4 & set 'fxFadeLoopChopper' 0 : nothing : loop 4 ? loop_position & param_bigger 90% ? set 'fxFadeLoopChopper' 1 : var 'fxFadeLoopChopper' 1 ? cycle 'fxFadeLoopCounter' 2 & var 'fxFadeLoopCounter' 0 ? loop 2 & set 'fxFadeLoopChopper' 0 : set 'fxFadeLoopChopper' 0 : nothing : loop 2 ? loop_position & param_bigger 90% ? set 'fxFadeLoopChopper' 1 : var 'fxFadeLoopChopper' 1 ? loop 1 & set 'fxFadeLoopChopper' 0 : nothing : nothing : repeat_stop "fxFadeLoopChop"
page.pad6: var 'fxFadeLP' 2 ? repeat_start_instant 'fxFadeLP' ? blink 500ms & repeat_stop 'fxFadeLP' & effect_active 'Filter LP' off & set 'fxFadeLP' 0 : blink 500ms & effect_active 'Filter LP' off & set 'fxFadeLP' 0 : set 'fxFadeLP' 2 & set 'fxFadeStepsLP' 0 & effect_slider 'filter lp' 1 0 & effect_active 'filter lp' on & set 'beatMS' `get_bpm & param_1_x & param_multiply 60000` & param_multiply 0.5 &param_cast 'ms' & repeat_start_instant 'fxFadeLP' & effect_slider 'filter lp' 1 +0.03125 & cycle 'fxFadeStepsLP' 32 & var 'fxFadeStepsLP' 0 ? off & repeat_stop 'fxFadeLP'
page.pad2: var 'fxFadeLP' 1 ? repeat_start_instant 'fxFadeLP' ? blink 500ms & repeat_stop 'fxFadeLP' & effect_active 'Filter LP' off & set 'fxFadeLP' 0 : blink 500ms & effect_active 'Filter LP' off & set 'fxFadeLP' 0 : set 'fxFadeLP' 1 & set 'fxFadeStepsLP' 0 & effect_slider 'filter lp' 1 0 & effect_active 'filter lp' on & set 'beatMS' `get_bpm & param_1_x & param_multiply 60000` & param_multiply 0.25 &param_cast 'ms' & repeat_start_instant 'fxFadeLP' & effect_slider 'filter lp' 1 +0.03125 & cycle 'fxFadeStepsLP' 32 & var 'fxFadeStepsLP' 0 ? off & repeat_stop 'fxFadeLP'
page.pad5: var 'fxFadeHP' 2 ? repeat_start_instant 'fxFadeHP' ? blink 500ms & repeat_stop 'fxFadeHP' & effect_active 'Filter HP' off & set 'fxFadeHP' 0 : blink 500ms & effect_active 'Filter HP' off & set 'fxFadeHP' 0 : set 'fxFadeHP' 2 & set 'fxFadeStepsHP' 0 & effect_slider 'filter hp' 1 0 & effect_active 'filter hp' on & set 'beatMS' `get_bpm & param_1_x & param_multiply 60000` & param_multiply 0.5 &param_cast 'ms' & repeat_start_instant 'fxFadeHP' & effect_slider 'filter hp' 1 +0.03125 & cycle 'fxFadeStepsHP' 32 & var 'fxFadeStepsHP' 0 ? off & repeat_stop 'fxFadeHP'
